news.t: Lazard Asset Management Launches its First Three Active ETFS in the U.S.

holdings.infoBox: THMZ is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Lazard Equity Megatrends ETF (THMZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation by investing globally in companies of any market capitalization. The fund aims to identify global megatrends and themes that are likely to shape the future. THMZ was launched on Apr 4, 2025 and is issued by Lazard.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Lazard announced the launch of its first three actively managed ETFs in the United States, offering more investors access to compelling, differentiated strategies fro...
